label: Resume
heading: Professional Profile
profileText: Full-stack JavaScript developer with a background in architecture. I bring a unique perspective to software development — combining structural thinking, design precision, and engineering discipline to build applications that are both technically robust and thoughtfully crafted.
archText: My engineering background instilled a systems-first mindset—where every decision serves a purpose and every detail contributes to the whole. Today, I apply that same philosophy to designing scalable software, building robust architectures, and creating digital experiences that are as functional as they are refined.
